mechanism_narrative: A sustained downward trend in FEDFUNDS over the trailing three months signals monetary easing that lowers the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of macro regime.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest value 3.88 down from recent highs
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS 3-month change and 20-day forward returns stays below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns following FEDFUNDS declines are not significantly higher than unconditional baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a trailing 3-month window, it signals an emerging labor market downturn (Sahm-rule-like trigger) that raises recession probability and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the following 20 trading days.
failure_condition: In triggered instances, SPX produces positive 20-day returns more than 55% of the time, or rank IC conditional on trigger is indistinguishable from zero (p > 0.10) across walk-forward folds.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains elevated above 3.5% while UNRATE simultaneously trends upward, the joint pattern signals a policy-mistake regime where restrictive monetary policy is amplifying labor deterioration, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as recession risk repricing accelerates.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS > 3.5% AND UNRATE rising over trailing 3 months
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with labor deterioration
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes show 60-day forward returns not significantly different from unconditional distribution (p > 0.05), or single-series FEDFUNDS/UNRATE models achieve equal or higher rank IC than the interaction model.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in HOUST during a late-cycle expansion regime signals weakening housing demand, a leading indicator of broader consumer demand contraction, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as the market anticipates slower economic growth.
failure_condition: During late-cycle regimes with declining HOUST, 60-day forward SPX returns are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the effect disappears outside late-cycle regime classification, indicating no regime-conditional edge.

mechanism_narrative: Positive month-over-month momentum in INDPRO reflects expanding industrial output and improving corporate earnings prospects, generating a short-term risk-on rally that produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days, active at all times without conditional gating.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO momentum and 5-day forward returns is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, indicating no persistent short-horizon predictive signal.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS month-over-month growth accelerates above 0.5%, it signals unexpectedly strong consumer spending that boosts near-term earnings expectations and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Triggered episodes show 5-day forward returns not significantly greater than the unconditional mean (p > 0.05), or win rate below 52% across at least 30 triggered instances in walk-forward testing.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, persistent CPIAUCSL increases above trend signal that inflation remains sticky, raising expectations of further FEDFUNDS hikes and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days as discount rates are repriced upward.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL YoY change accelerates while FEDFUNDS is above 3%
failure_condition: In tightening-cycle periods with accelerating CPIAUCSL, 20-day forward returns are not significantly negative (p > 0.05), or the relationship reverses sign in more than one out of three rolling test windows.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO growth decelerates while RSAFS growth simultaneously weakens, the joint signal indicates a synchronized slowdown in both production and consumption that produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days as forward earnings estimates are revised downward.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change negative AND RSAFS 3-month change negative
failure_condition: Joint-trigger episodes fail to produce 60-day forward returns significantly below the unconditional mean (p > 0.05), or the interaction model's rank IC does not exceed the best single-series model by more than 0.02.
